text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are on our way<n>back to the
academy, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, my silhouette is framed by the<n>twilit sky,
intensifying my glow.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So how can this be?! Look around<n>you, Trainer!

People, probably on their way home<n>from work,
are walking in and out of<n>the nearby train station.
They all look<n>exhausted.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! My heart aches at the sight!<n>Here they are, in
the presence of the<n>Overlord, yet they all look so
downtrodden!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, I have come to a decision. I<n>will perform
an opera, at this very<n>moment!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My radiance, filled with affection,<n>shall become a
fountain, watering<n>their wilted souls!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will take the starring role, with you<n>as my
support!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Naturally! You are my trainer. We aim<n>for the same
glorious stage, do we<n>not?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, let us begin the Evening OperaO Theater with full pomp andsplendor!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hark, you people on the move! ♪ Why<n>must you
look to your feet?

T.M. Opera O glances my way as if to<n>say, "That's
your cue."
choice_data_list: I guess I'll have to sing!
I guess I'll have to dance!

text_block_list.text:
Mustering my courage, I pick up<n>where she left
off.
choice_data_list: Lalalaaa... When you're lost on the road of life... ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Open your eyes, lift your chin. ♪ And<n>you might
behold my glaring sheen.♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am your shining light. ♪ I am your<n>guiding light. ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Look to me when it's all too much. ♪<n>Look to me
when you need a special<n>touch. ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I will relieve your woe! ♪ Why?<n>Because I am...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The light that makes the world shiiine!<n>♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: T.M. ♪ OPERA OOOOO! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: With that, the curtain falls on the<n>Opera O theater.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However, my presence should be<n>ingrained in
your hearts forever more.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Please, think of me when the going<n>gets tough!
For I am watching over<n>you all!

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaa! Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: I don't have a clue why, but seeingsomeone with that muchconfidence is... infectious!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text: Well, time to get back at it! Thanks for<n>the lift!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: At last, these empty husks have life<n>again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! All in a day's work—for<n>I am the sun
that brightens the spirit<n>of humanity!

I'm impressed once again by Opera<n>O's curious
charm, even if her<n>sudden antics are a constant
surprise.

Doing my best to recall her lessons, I<n>start
dancing.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Ah! Nice footwork, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But I cannot allow you to steal the<n>spotlight! Haah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've the elegance of a swan! The<n>might of an
eagle!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Let our dance bring hope to the<n>people!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
I don't have a clue why, but... I<n>suddenly feel like
dancing!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
I think watching them just made me<n>feel a little
better!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh! The people have life in their<n>eyes once again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...I must say though, I'm impressed<n>you kept up
with my dance to the<n>end!
choice_data_list:
I may have gone a little too hard. It's all a blur to
me...

I may have gone a little too hard. It's all a blur to
me...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
These are the results of you basking<n>in my
presence day in and day out.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, burn my image into your mind<n>and bring out
your talents to the<n>fullest!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Do not restrain yourself! Unleash!<n>Unleash!

Our special opera performance is<n>over, but we're
still the center of<n>attention.

I'm impressed once again by Opera<n>O's curious
charm, even if her<n>sudden antics are a constant
surprise.
